name: White Unicorn Small Security Blanket - Cloud Island™
description:
Comfort your little one in sweet, magical style with this Unicorn Small Security Blanket from cloud Island™. This handkerchief-shaped white security blanket is made of soft, fuzzy fabric with light pink satin trim for a touch of shine. It's topped with a white unicorn head featuring pink ears and mane, a yellow horn and white little arms that will instantly catch their attention. Perfectly sized for stroller rides and car trips, it makes a warm and cuddly companion to keep your baby company while they play and beyond.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
